# Report Card (Form 138) — Grades 7–10 (JHS) — EXACT Layout

Source: 4 screenshots from the live NPS card view (SY 2025-2026), provided by Registrar
Marites C. Ramos. Samples: Grade X (ABERGOS), Grade IX (AGOMAA), Grade VIII (AGPOON),
Grade VII (ALBEUS). **Same overall layout as [report-card-grades-2-6.md](report-card-grades-2-6.md)**
— identity header, two columns, ACADEMIC legend, DEPORTMENT/CORE VALUES, ATTENDANCE,
CERTIFICATION, CANCELLATION, red "Not valid for transfer.", and the `☐ Valid for transfer.`
+ `TO PDF` footer with the same behavior. Only the differences are listed below.

> Drop the original PNGs here: `report-card-grade7.png` … `report-card-grade10.png`.

## Academic subject list PER GRADE (reproduce exactly)
- **Grade VII** (MATATAG): **Values Educ.- CLE** · Filipino · English · Mathematics · Science · Araling Panlipunan · TLE-ICT · MAPEH · **Music & Arts** · **Physical Edu. & Health**
- **Grade VIII** (MATATAG): **Values Educ.- CLE** · Filipino · English · Mathematics · Science · Araling Panlipunan · TLE-ICT · MAPEH · **Music & Arts** · **Physical Edu. & Health**
- **Grade IX** (old curriculum): **CLE-ESP** · Filipino · English · Mathematics · Science · Araling Panlipunan · TLE-ICT · MAPEH · **Music** · **Arts** · **Physical Education** · **Health**
- **Grade X** (old curriculum): **CLE-ESP** · Filipino · English · Mathematics · Science · Araling Panlipunan · TLE-ICT · MAPEH · **Music** · **Arts** · **Physical Education** · **Health**

> Note vs elementary: JHS uses **TLE-ICT** (not EPP-ICT). Grades 7–8 use "Values Educ.-
> CLE" + MAPEH in 2 components; Grades 9–10 use "CLE-ESP" + MAPEH in 4 components.
> Same summary rows: **Average** (per quarter, may carry decimals) · **Conduct** (letters) ·
> **Promoted to Grade <N+1>** · **General Average**.

## SPECIAL PROGRAMS table (JHS variant)
Columns: SUBJECTS · 1st · 2nd · 3rd · 4th · FINAL (letters: O, VS, MO).
Rows: **Foreign Language · Homeroom Guidance · SAP** (no Computer/Scouting at JHS).

## Right column — same as elementary
- DEPORTMENT / CORE VALUES: Faith · Integrity · Respect · Excellence · Social
  Responsibility (AO/SO/RO/NO, same legend).
- ATTENDANCE REPORT: School Days · Days Present · Days Absent · Times Tardy ×
  Jun…Apr · Total.
- CERTIFICATION: "…eligible for transfer and admission to **Grade <N+1>**" (Grade X → Grade XI).
- Signatories: Class Adviser (left) · Principal MRS. ROSARIO OLALIA (right).
- CANCELLATION OF TRANSFER ELIGIBILITY + red "Not valid for transfer." + footer controls.

## ACADEMIC legend (same as elementary)
Outstanding 90-100 · Very Satisfactory 85-89 · Satisfactory 80-84 · Fairly Satisfactory
75-79 (all Passed) · Did not meet expectations Below 75 (Failed).
